# hetzner

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Hetzner Cloud SSH provider: detects console.hetzner.com console URLs and contributes the two Hetzner-specific install steps (open the web terminal → paste the authorized_keys one-liner) into the shared SSH setup flow.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SshProvider` "Hetzner"
  - Uses:
    - `apps/deploy/ssh-setup.SshProvider`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/setup-steps.StepCommand`
    - `primitives/setup-steps.StepLink`
    - `primitives/setup-steps.StepNote`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
